images.alt_text: Logo Amioud — monogramma circolare con A stilizzata, oro su fondo chiaro
images.notes: Secondary logo from client CDN. Circular sunburst 'A' monogram — classier than the pixelated 'AMIOVD' wordmark and fits the luxury/editorial direction better. Use as primary mark. Request SVG from client for crisp nav/preloader rendering.

images.alt_text: Logo testuale Amioud — AMIOVD, wordmark ridotto a una linea
images.notes: The full 'AMIOVD' wordmark. Pixelated despite 1200px width (poor rasterization from client). Keep as fallback for footer/small contexts; DO NOT use in hero or above-the-fold. Flag: request vector SVG.

images.alt_text: Tre flaconi Amioud emergenti dalla nebbia violetta — poster del video di apertura
images.notes: Auto-extracted poster frame for the hero video. Dreamy violet-rose smoke with bottles softly silhouetted. Perfect match for the brand manual's ETEREO / ONIRICO keywords. Resolution is modest (1100px) — adequate as a poster, but not usable as a standalone hero image on desktop. Hero should always render the video.

images.alt_text: Amber Dusk — flacone Amioud Hair Essence accanto alla scatola con texture marmorizzata rosa e blu
images.notes: Pitchdeck slide 6 — 50ml bottle + box lifestyle on reflective white. Marbled box echoes the cap. Strong home-page preview card.

images.alt_text: Bubble Garden — flacone Amioud Hair Essence con la sua scatola marmorizzata
images.notes: Pitchdeck slide 4. Bottle + box. Matches the set.

images.alt_text: Midnight in Florence — flacone Amioud Hair Essence con la sua scatola marmorizzata
images.notes: Pitchdeck slide 5. Bottle + box. Matches the set — all three home previews are shot as one continuous editorial.

images.alt_text: Flacone di profumo Amioud avvolto in un nastro di seta viola, luce pomeridiana su fondo crema
images.notes: Generated editorial still life — single violet-tinted bottle with silk ribbon on cream background. Reads as 'invitation' and fits the trova-la-tua-fragranza quiz CTA. Minor garbled text watermark bottom-left (faint, cropped by typical UI overlay). Model: flux, seed 77. Prompt kept on-brand (no people, editorial, muted palette).

images.attribution: Photo by Ferdinando Ferrazzi via Pexels
images.alt_text: Officina Profumo Santa Maria Novella a Firenze — fila di flaconi in vetro satinato con etichette dorate su mensola in legno caldo, illuminazione ambient
images.notes: Santa Maria Novella boutique in Firenze. Photographer is Italian, subject is literally the historic Italian perfumery tradition that Midnight in Florence references. Double duty: serves both the home 'Rivenditori' CTA and the /rivenditori hero. Warm wood tones align with cream palette; brass accents pick up the gold Amioud bottle-label.

images.attribution: Photo by Ferdinando Ferrazzi via Pexels
images.alt_text: Mensola di flaconi Officina Profumo Santa Maria Novella a Firenze — vetro satinato, etichette dorate, legno caldo
images.notes: Same physical asset as `rivenditori-cta` — reused intentionally so the home CTA and the /rivenditori hero read as the same world. If Denis wants a differentiated shot for /rivenditori, swap this entry for a second Pexels pick. File is listed once on disk and referenced twice in the manifest.

images.alt_text: Tre flaconi con tappo marmorizzato viola disposti su superficie in marmo crema, luce dorata di fine pomeriggio
images.notes: Reseeded (seed 142) generation for the /shop placeholder hero. Approximates the Amioud bottle family — frosted glass, yellow liquid, purple marbled cap — though the bottle silhouette is square vs. the real rounded-rectangle. Acceptable for a text-heavy catalog page; real product imagery is shown below. Could be replaced by a composite of the three real product shots if the builder prefers.

images.alt_text: Amber Dusk — flacone di vetro satinato con tappo sferico marmorizzato viola, luce dorata del tramonto
images.notes: Clean vertical packshot on cream — dramatic slanting sidelight matches the 'Amber Dusk / tramonto dorato' concept precisely. The editorial sidelight is the through-line for all three fragrance hero images.

images.alt_text: Bubble Garden — flacone Amioud con tappo marmorizzato viola su fondo crema con luce morbida
images.notes: Vertical packshot from the same editorial session as Amber Dusk and Midnight. Consistent set — use as the Bubble Garden product page hero.

images.alt_text: Midnight in Florence — flacone Amioud con tappo marmorizzato viola, composizione minimale, luce calda laterale
images.notes: Part of the same three-bottle editorial. Use as Midnight in Florence hero.

images.alt_text: Amber Dusk — flacone contornato da lavanda, baccelli di vaniglia, fiori d'arancio e cristalli d'ambra
images.notes: Ingredient-led still life: lavender sprigs, vanilla pods, white florals, amber crystals. Directly visualizes the Amber Dusk olfactory pyramid. Use on the product page notes section. Better than any abstract GLSL shader — the composition already IS the visualization.

images.alt_text: Bubble Garden — flacone Amioud adagiato sull'acqua circondato da petali di rosa rosa e pesca, vista dall'alto
images.notes: Blog hero that visualizes the 'bubble garden' concept perfectly — floating on water with petals. Used as the primary fragrance-notes image for Bubble Garden; landscape-oriented so also a strong candidate for the product page top-band.

images.alt_text: Midnight in Florence — flacone Amioud con iris viola, muschio verde e tavolette di cioccolato bianco
images.notes: Still life with iris (signature Florentine flower), cornflowers, moss, and white chocolate pieces. Directly visualizes the Midnight in Florence pyramid. Use on the product page notes section.

images.alt_text: Amber Dusk 50ml — packshot isolato su fondo bianco
images.notes: Pitchdeck slide 1. Clean packshot; complements the sidelit hero with a neutral studio shot.

images.alt_text: Amber Dusk 20ml travel — flacone mignon accanto alla scatola marmorizzata
images.notes: Pitchdeck slide 12. 20ml travel-size with box. Shows the format variant customers can pick.

images.alt_text: Bubble Garden 50ml — packshot isolato
images.notes: Pitchdeck slide 3. Clean packshot.

images.alt_text: Bubble Garden 20ml travel — flacone mignon con scatola
images.notes: Pitchdeck slide 10. 20ml travel variant.

images.alt_text: Midnight in Florence 50ml — packshot isolato
images.notes: Pitchdeck slide 2. Clean packshot.

images.alt_text: Midnight in Florence 20ml travel — flacone mignon con scatola
images.notes: Pitchdeck slide 11. 20ml travel variant.

images.alt_text: Violet Collection — tre flaconi Amioud disposti su podi di marmo con rami di lavanda
images.notes: Editorial hero-band for /visione. Three bottles on marble podiums with lavender, warm plaster/mauve wall. Sets up the 'ecosistema' story and reads as elevated still-life photography — Aesop / Byredo territory.

images.alt_text: Prima — ritratto di modella con capelli sciolti mossi dal vento su fondo blu notte
images.notes: The 'Prima' half of the before/after pair. Editorial model portrait — dark hair, violet fabric, dreamy lighting. Fits the visione narrative. Before/after can play as a two-frame transition on the visione page.

images.alt_text: Dopo — stessa modella con petali viola tra i capelli — la trasformazione Amioud
images.notes: 'Dopo' half. Same setup, small purple petals now scattered through the hair. Metaphor-heavy but luxury-appropriate; pairs with 'Prima' as a reveal scroll.

EMPTY — Manuel Caputo (Amministratore Unico, Aura Company S.R.L.) appears in the legal notice but no portrait on the public site. Facebook/Instagram at @amioudofficial could be probed but luxury-fragrance agent rule forbids stock substitution for founder portraits. Flagged `needs_denis` — ask client for a portrait or drop the team section from /visione. Builder should accept whichever the brief specifies.

videos.license: Client-owned. Reuse of live-site asset — same brand, same subject, pulled from the Shopify CDN.
videos.alt_text: Video di apertura Amioud — flaconi che emergono da una nebbia viola e rosa
videos.notes: Downloaded directly from amioud.com Shopify CDN after grepping the homepage HTML. 1080p, ~5.4MB, H.264. The subject (bottles in dreamy mist) already matches the brand manual's ETEREO / ONIRICO keywords — ideal HeroVideo source. Confirm builder sets `muted`, `autoplay`, `playsinline`, `loop`. Poster image filled by `hero-poster` slot.

needs_generation.reason: No founder portrait on public site; luxury-fragrance rule forbids stock substitute for real-person slots. Either obtain a portrait from the client or drop the founder section from /visione.

flags_for_denis: LOGO: the primary raster logo on the client CDN is not vector. Request the SVG from Manuel/Aura Company — the current 'AMIOVD' wordmark is visibly pixelated at 1200px width, which is a red flag for a luxury brand.
HERO VIDEO: successfully captured from the Shopify CDN (1080p, 5.4MB). No tier fallback needed. If this video is licensed or updated by the client, let the pipeline know so we re-pull.
TEAM PORTRAIT: no photo of Manuel Caputo (founder / Amministratore Unico) on the live site. Flag for client follow-up — or confirm that /visione drops the founder block. Pipeline does NOT fabricate.

POLLINATIONS: two slots were generated (quiz-cta, shop-hero). Both passed the luxury-still-life rubric on first-or-second attempt (quiz-cta seed 77, shop-hero reseeded once from seed 77 to seed 142 after bottle-cap misread). If the brief pushes for a text-heavy /shop with no decorative hero, the shop-hero slot can be dropped — it's the weakest image in the manifest.

RIVENDITORI: Pexels photo chosen is literally Santa Maria Novella in Firenze — a culturally perfect tie-in to 'Midnight in Florence'. If Denis wants to lean into this, the /rivenditori page copy should reference the 1612 lineage.
VARIANTE GIALLA: the unreleased yellow variant in `pitchdeck amioud/variantegialla.png` was deliberately NOT copied or used anywhere. Confirmed instruction.

BRIEF.JSON NOT YET PRESENT: the researcher is still running. This manifest was written from analysis.json + Denis's slot inventory in the spawn prompt. Slot names may need reconciliation once brief.json lands — particularly any `notes-visualization` GLSL slots or 3D-bottle `three-glb` slots that were speculative. No custom-glsl or three-glb slots were filled from manual-assets (none present). If brief.json adds them, concept-architect will decide whether to trigger cd-signature.
attributions_required: Photo by Ferdinando Ferrazzi via Pexels (rivenditori-cta / rivenditori-hero). Pexels license does not legally require attribution; credit recorded for traceability and goodwill.
